---
title: About
---

I'm Peter Levy, a data analyst at the UK Centre for Ecology & Hydrology (CEH). This site collects data analyses of no fixed abode — pieces of work that don't have a natural home elsewhere, mostly written up as reproducible R/Quarto documents.

### Contact

Find me on [GitHub](https://github.com/peterlevy) or [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/users/14319767/plevy).
